description: These T-strap sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with wide woven straps. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses, ethnic wear and jeans.UpperMetallic T-strap embellished with metallic disks for a snug Fit and extra comfortSynthetic toe separator for added comfortSynthetic leather lined footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
